scenario: Kyverno Policy Violation — no resource limits + runAsRoot
query: audit-exporter pod rejected by Kyverno, missing CPU/memory limits and runs as root

events.message: Error creating: admission webhook "validate.kyverno.svc" denied the request: resource Deployment/production/audit-exporter was blocked due to the following policies require-resource-limits: check-cpu-limit, check-memory-limit
Back-off restarting failed container audit-exporter in pod audit-exporter-7c9f4d2b1-mp3k7_production

violations.message: CPU limit must be set. Container audit-exporter has no resources.limits.cpu.
Memory limit must be set. Container audit-exporter has no resources.limits.memory.
Pod must not run as root. Set securityContext.runAsNonRoot=true.
